description.user: Establish the frontend baseline for users, departments, and roles.
description.role: Close the loop around role groups and menu assignment.
description.dept: The current contract closes the tree, creation, and read-only details first.
description.menu: The current contract closes the tree, creation, and menu type handling first.

dialog.userDesc: User creation supports department binding; role assignment stays as a separate action.
dialog.roleDesc: Role codes stay stable after creation; later edits only adjust name and scope.
dialog.deptCreateDesc: The current contract has no update endpoint, so P2 closes the tree creation flow first.
dialog.menuCreateDesc: DIRECTORY / MENU / BUTTON nodes share the same create form.

hint.roleAssignmentContract: The current contract has no endpoint to query assigned roles for a user. The page only caches selections in the current session, so the first assignment needs manual confirmation.
hint.menuAssignmentContract: The current contract has no endpoint to query assigned menus for a role. The page only caches selections in the current session, so the first assignment needs manual confirmation.
hint.resetPassword: The backend only exposes the reset action and never returns the password value. The input here will overwrite the current password directly.
hint.deptContract: The current backend contract has no department update endpoint, so this screen stays read-only for details.
hint.menuContract: The current backend contract has no menu update endpoint, so this screen stays read-only for details.

message.actionFailed: Action failed. Please try again later.

validation.username: Username must be at least 3 characters.
validation.password: Password must be at least 8 characters.
